understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle levels by using the selectable pieces to push a movable block/object onto the goal tile(s) marked with '+', achieving the engine's WIN condition within the available step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you control the currently selected piece (shown as P in the semantic grid) and MOVE actions shift it by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, unless blocked by walls or other objects. If a pushable block is directly adjacent in the movement direction and the space beyond it is free, the move can push the block along with the selected piece. Walls ('#') generally prevent movement/pushing through them, though some boundaries may behave differently and need to be tested. Levels may include multiple selectable pieces (shown as S); using CLICK with the exact pixel coordinates of a selectable switches control to that piece, after which MOVE commands apply to the newly selected piece.
